message:
I’ll never forget the time I was preparing for a winter storm and ended up looking like the world’s most gloriously over-prepared person. I had enough snacks to feed a small army, a mountain of blankets, and yes, even a manual can opener (because I’ve learned that it’s the little things that can trip you up!). 

As the snow fell softly outside, I felt a cozy sense of calm. My neighbors were out scrambling for last-minute supplies, but I was nestled in with my hot cocoa, feeling like a winter warrior. 

It’s funny how being ready can take the stress out of unpredictable weather. Just a little prep goes a long way! 

Have you ever found yourself preparing for a storm and going a bit overboard? What’s your favorite comfort snack for cozying up during a weather event? This little refresher helped me remember what to keep on hand!
